revision.comment: doing this to force an update since the ambox redirect is messing with things
Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23176857634|manual triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__|$B= {{Ambox | name = Confusing | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:substcheck}}</includeonly> | small = {{{small|}}} | type = style | class = ambox-confusing | sect = {{{1|}}} | issue = '''may be [[Wikipedia:Vagueness|confusing or unclear]] to readers'''. {{#if:{{{reason|}}}|In particular, {{{reason}}}.}} | fix = Please help [[Wikipedia:Please clarify|clarify the {{{1|article}}}]]. There {{#if:{{{talk|{{{2|}}}}}}|is|might be}} a discussion about this on {{#if:{{{talk|{{{2|}}}}}}|{{format link|{{{talk|{{{2|}}}}}}}}|[[{{TALKPAGENAME}}|the talk page]]}}. | removalnotice = yes | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = Wikipedia articles needing clarification | all = All Wikipedia articles needing clarification }} }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. -->
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__|$B= {{Ambox | name = Confusing | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:substcheck}}</includeonly> | small = {{{small|}}} | type = style | class = ambox-confusing | sect = {{{1|}}} | issue = '''may be [[Wikipedia:Vagueness|confusing or unclear]] to readers'''. {{#if:{{{reason|}}}|In particular, {{{reason}}}.}} | fix = Please help [[Wikipedia:Please clarify|clarify the {{{1|article}}}]]. There {{#if:{{{talk|{{{2|}}}}}}|is|might be}} a discussion about this on {{#if:{{{talk|{{{2|}}}}}}|{{format link|{{{talk|{{{2|}}}}}}}}|[[{{TALKPAGENAME}}|the talk page]]}}. | removalnotice = yes | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = Wikipedia articles needing clarification | all = All Wikipedia articles needing clarification }} }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. -->
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Confusing here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Confusing for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__|$B= {{Ambox | name = Confusing | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:substcheck}}</includeonly> | small = {{{small|}}} | type = style | class = ambox-confusing | sect = {{{1|}}} | issue = '''may be [[Wikipedia:Vagueness|confusing or unclear]] to readers'''. {{#if:{{{reason|}}}|In particular, {{{reason}}}.}} | fix = Please help [[Wikipedia:Please clarify|clarify the {{{1|article}}}]]. There {{#if:{{{talk|{{{2|}}}}}}|is|might be}} a discussion about this on {{#if:{{{talk|{{{2|}}}}}}|{{format link|{{{talk|{{{2|}}}}}}}}|[[{{TALKPAGENAME}}|the talk page]]}}. | removalnotice = yes | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = Wikipedia articles needing clarification | all = All Wikipedia articles needing clarification }} }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. -->
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
